rationale: The citing paper’s stated contribution includes an “incentive-aligned group-sourced preference measurement mechanism” and its relation-to-prior-work note explicitly says it extends prior incentive-aligned conjoint work. The cited paper is precisely “An Incentive-Aligned Mechanism for Conjoint Analysis,” introducing and validating that mechanism class (truth-telling/BDM), so this is likely a substantive methodological foundation rather than a passing mention.
